registry_item.name: generic-crud-factory
registry_item.title: Generic CRUD Router Factory
registry_item.description: 抽象出可复用的 tRPC v11 CRUD router 工厂函数，适配 Prisma 风格 model delegate

meta_loom.interface_sig: export const createCrudRouter: (model: CrudModel) => ReturnType<typeof createTRPCRouter>
meta_loom.tradeoffs: 泛型 CRUD 工厂，按资源名生成 router。适合多资源复用、减少样板；抽象层带来理解成本，定制单点逻辑较绕。

l0.summary: 可复用的 tRPC v11 CRUD router 工厂，接收 Prisma 风格 model delegate 并生成 list/get/create/update/delete

types: type CrudModel = { findMany: Function; findUnique: Function; create: Function; update: Function; delete: Function }
